positive: A stylized, minimalist, symmetrical pattern featuring interlocking celestial bodies and organic botanical elements. Include crescent moons, abstract constellations composed of geometric lines, and stylized lilies and fern fronds. The design should have a strong, high-contrast, silhouette aesthetic, executed in deep indigo and muted gold against a neutral background. The composition must be perfectly balanced and repeatable, suitable for all-over fabric printing. Vector illustration style, thick clean linework, graphic design, perfect symmetry, centered composition, studio lighting, high resolution, print-ready.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, artifacts, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, realistic photograph, photorealism
